summary: Strategic pivot testing from B2B/B2C to 100% B2C career mentorship completed successfully. All core features verified: new B2C content, navigation updates (Companies removed), new MentoringPage with 3 services, career-focused AboutPage, contact dropdown with mentorship options, Calendly integration, footer navigation, and multi-language support (EN/PT/ES) across all pages.

issues: Route shows blank content (header/footer only) instead of proper 404 page. This is acceptable but could be improved with a catch-all route.

passed_tests: Home page renders with new B2C headline: 'Decoding Big Tech. Aligning Executive Careers.'
Single CTA 'Explore Mentorship' present and points to /mentoring
Navigation shows only: Mentoring, About, Contact (NO Companies link)
Mentoring page (/mentoring) loads with 3 services: Big Tech Interview Mastery, Executive Presence & Storytelling, Career Acceleration Strategy
About page loads with career-focused expertise section (NO governance/B2B expertise)
Contact page has dropdown with 3 mentorship options: Big Tech Interview Coaching, Executive Career Mentorship, Storytelling Workshops
Contact page has working Calendly embed (react-calendly InlineWidget)
Footer shows only: Mentoring, About, Contact links (NO Companies)
Language switching works correctly for EN on all pages
Language switching works correctly for ES (Spanish) on all pages
Language switching works correctly for PT (Portuguese) on all pages
All internal navigation links work correctly (/mentoring, /about, /contact)
/companies route correctly does not render CompaniesPage (page was deleted)
Mobile responsive design verified - hamburger menu works
Design quality confirmed: white background, black text (minimalist luxury design)
B&W image present with proper styling
critical_code_review_comments: Consider adding a catch-all 404 route in App.js for better UX when accessing deleted routes like /companies
context_for_next_testing_agent: B2C pivot complete. All pages verified: HomePage with new headline and single CTA, MentoringPage with 3 career services, AboutPage with career-focused expertise, ContactPage with mentorship dropdown and Calendly. Companies page deleted, /companies shows blank (no 404 page). Multi-language (EN/PT/ES) working on all pages.
